args.message: Well-maintained to me means a car that starts every time, drives smoothly, and doesn't have any major red flags – all of which this Camry does! I saw a car just like this, same year and trim, go for $18,995 at auction last week. This one, at $18,495, is a steal considering its condition and the fact that it's a Toyota. The previous owner was older and just didn't keep up with the little things, but the big things are all solid. You're getting a fantastic deal here.
